WITH profile_sentiment AS (
 SELECT p.id AS profile_id, ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, 'pizza'::tsquery) AS ranking
 FROM profile p
)
SELECT ps.profile_id, p.username AS restaurant_name
FROM profile_sentiment ps
JOIN profile p ON ps.profile_id = p.id
ORDER BY ps.ranking DESC
LIMIT 10;
